summary: Arqel dogfood loop — Round 16: re-detect against main (87 framework bugs fixed across rounds 0-15). Deepest probes into the least-covered surfaces (audit attribute filtering, realtime broadcast dispatch, mcp tools, cli generators, export xlsx/formatting, i18n/locale, theme, command palette, a11y, edge-case interactions between traits). Seen-filtered (93 sigs), adversarial verify. Round 15 found 4 (BelongsToField searchRoute HIGH, SelectField optionsRelationship, AI controllers 500, Column getState/formatState dead) + 1 security follow-up (AI controllers reflected upstream error bodies). Consecutive-clean counter 0/2. Stop after 2 consecutive clean rounds.
logs: Round 16 detection: 1 from clusters = 1 after dedup/seen-filter
Round 16 verify: 1 confirmed NEW framework bugs, 0 app-misuse, 0 not-a-bug

confirmedFrameworkBugs.title: Action modal form fields are never serialized to full FieldSchema — every action-form field renders blank (options/label/placeholder/validation dropped)
confirmedFrameworkBugs.fixSketch: In Action::toArray() add a 'formFields' key serializing getFormFields() through FieldSchemaSerializer (full FieldSchema with options/label/props), and have ActionButton/ActionMenu read action.formFields (or thread formFieldsByAction from InertiaDataBuilder through ArqelIndexPage) so FormRenderer's fields Map is populated; getFormSchemaArray() {name,type} stays only as the layout schema.
confirmedFrameworkBugs.reasoning: Verified end-to-end on current main, could not refute. (1) PHP: HasForm::getFormSchemaArray() (HasForm.php:113-124) emits only {name,type}, dropping options/label/placeholder/helperText/validation/type-props; its docblock defers full materialization to FieldSchemaSerializer 'once it lands', but that serializer has landed (core/src/Support/FieldSchemaSerializer.php, used elsewhere) and is never applied to action form fields. (2) No producer: InertiaDataBuilder.serializeMany/callToArray (packages/core/src/Support/InertiaDataBuilder.php:190-212,~487-544) only call Action::toArray(); a full-repo grep across core/, packages-js/, apps/ shows formFields/formFieldsByAction appear ONLY in their own prop declarations + defaults (ActionButton.tsx:24,50; ActionMenu.tsx:26,36) and coverage HTML — nothing ever populates them. (3) React consumer: ArqelIndexPage.tsx:250 (<ActionButton> bulk) and :264 (<ActionMenu> row) never pass formFields/formFieldsByAction, so they default to []/{}. (4) FormRenderer.tsx:65-66 does `const field = fieldsByName.get(entry.name); if (!field) return null;` — with an empty fields array EVERY action-form field returns null; ActionFormModal.tsx:59-89 builds layout from action.form (name+type) but renders via fields={formFields} (empty). FieldSchema (types/src/fields.ts:53-55 + per-type props like SelectFieldProps.options) is a distinct, richer type from ActionFormField (name+type only), so action.form entries can never structurally satisfy the fields Map. Net: any Action->form([SelectField->options([...]),...]) opens a modal empty except submit/cancel. (5) HasFormTest.php:38-41 pins the stub shape [{name,type}] and lines 19-27 build a SelectField with options but never assert they survive — masking the gap (tests-mask-integration-gaps). Not a deferred feature: the API is fully wired (modal opens, layout built) and documented as functional; the only missing link is the full field payload. Distinct from all prior fixes (none touched action-form field serialization). Classified framework-bug: a vanilla user-land Action->form([...]) usage is broken with no app-side remedy.
confirmedFrameworkBugs.evidence: PHP side: Action::toArray() (packages/actions/src/Action.php:340) ships 'form' => getFormSchemaArray(), and HasForm::getFormSchemaArray() (packages/actions/src/Concerns/HasForm.php:113-124) emits ONLY [{name, type}] per field — it drops options, label, placeholder, helperText, validation, and all type-specific props. Its own docblock says 'controllers materialise the full payload via FieldSchemaSerializer (CORE-010) once it lands', but CORE-010 has landed (core/src/Support/FieldSchemaSerializer.php, used everywhere via #203/#204) and NO core path ever serializes action form fields with it: InertiaDataBuilder::serializeMany/callToArray (core/src/Support/InertiaDataBuilder.php:487-544) only call Action::toArray() — there is no producer for the React 'formFields' prop. React side: ActionButton (packages-js/ui/src/action/ActionButton.tsx:24,50,114) declares formFields?: FieldSchema[] defaulting to [] ('resolved server-side from Action::form') and ActionMenu (ActionMenu.tsx:26,36,52) declares formFieldsByAction defaulting to {}; both are never populated from page props anywhere in packages-js. ActionFormModal (ActionFormModal.tsx:61-65,89) builds its layout from action.form (name+type only) but renders fields via <FormRenderer fields={formFields}>. FormRenderer.tsx:65-66 does `const field = fieldsByName.get(entry.name); if (!field) return null;` — with formFields=[] the Map is empty, so EVERY action-form field returns null. Net effect: any Action with ->form([SelectField::make('reason')->options([...])->required(), ...]) opens a modal that is empty except the submit button — the select has no options, fields have no labels, the form is unusable. Test masks it: actions/tests/Unit/HasFormTest.php:23 builds a SelectField WITH options but lines 39-40 assert the serialized schema is only [{name:'reason',type:'text'},{name:'note',type:'text'}], pinning the stub shape instead of the full payload (tests-mask-integration-gaps). Distinct from all 87 prior fixes — none touched action-form field serialization.
